title: Subitems View - Columns do not stay in each users view
excerpt: Love the feature of how you can save a view for each user on the main parent table (tasks), but it doesn’t seem to apply to the subitems. Is this something in the works?

posts.author: opaek (Olivia Paek)
posts.cookedHtml: Love the feature of how you can save a view for each user on the main parent table (tasks), but it doesn’t seem to apply to the subitems. Is this something in the works?

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apparently, nothing was done on this subject in the past 2 years.
It would be very nice to have the possibility to hide a subitem column in a certain view and not in another one (like the items columns). In the same idea, it would be nice to be able to have the subitems column in a certain order in a view, and in another order in another view (like the items column).
Finally, even if you hide a subitem column for certain users, it does not work on the mobile app. It would be very nice to have this feature …
Thanks
